description: Assign rblocks to named groups (with optional slot) for range-based operations.

python_sdk_alternative.workaround: Use itasca.command('rblock group ...') via command interface

keywords.name: add
keywords.description: Assign s to the next available slot.

keywords.name: slot
keywords.description: Set group slot slot to s . By default, slot Default is used.
